_doc: KARTA Skrolik (pierscien do przewijania) — zrodlo prawdy BRAMEK (qa_gate/product_gate). Anatomia = checklista, NIE tekst promptow. Zrodlo: PASZPORT.md + KARTA-PRAWDY.md + galeria Ali detail (keep1..5).

product.anatomy_str: small pink wedge/keystone block on an OPEN split silicone C-clip band, worn on a finger; top plate carries THREE round raised buttons in a single diagonal row, each embossed with a small triangle; one side of the block has a recessed shine rail/groove, the clip side has a dark oval charging port plus a tiny LED pinhole; matte pastel-pink ABS body with a matching pink open silicone clip; zero logos, zero text, zero screen on the product
product.functional_count: 3 round buttons in one row (exactly three — never two, never four)
product.exactly_one: EXACTLY ONE ring controller in the scene, worn on ONE finger (the other hand holds no second device)
product._cv_reliable_why: pastelowy roz ~ kolor skory (SSOT 0f) + w kadrze dominuje skora dloni -> maska HSV bezuzyteczna; licznik egzemplarzy robi VLM wiersz-na-klatke.
forbidden_leaks: closed solid ring band (it is an OPEN split C-clip, never a full closed ring)
extra buttons, four or more buttons
any screen or display on the ring itself
readable text or brand logo on the product
nail polish color bleeding onto the product body
elements: korpus_klin — pink wedge/keystone block, wider than the finger, matte pastel pink ABS (NOT a flat slab, NOT metal)
trzy_przyciski — THREE round raised buttons in ONE diagonal row on the top plate, each embossed with a triangle; exactly three, never two or four
klips_C — OPEN split silicone C-clip band in matching pink, wrapping the finger (NOT a closed continuous ring)
szyna_bok — recessed shine rail/groove on one side of the block
port_LED — dark oval charging port + tiny LED pinhole on the clip side (may be legitimately out of frame in a tight macro; if visible it must be a plain dark oval, no USB text)

mechanism_states._doc: produkt bez zmiany stanu mechanizmu w scenie — statyczny na palcu; jedyna zmiana = ekran telefonu (feed) + ruch kciuka

scenography.layout: bright modern home interior: a warm light-wood or clean neutral surface, softly blurred cozy background; a smartphone stands upright hands-free (leaning against a couple of books, never a branded phone stand) showing a generic vertical short-video feed
scenography.swiatlo: bright high-key warm natural daylight from a window, soft shadows, airy and clean

action_steps: ring clipped on the index finger
thumb of the SAME hand reaches over the top plate and presses one of the three buttons
the phone's vertical feed scrolls UP hands-free, with no finger touching the screen
grammar.both_hands: index finger wears the ring and the thumb of the SAME hand presses the buttons; the other hand is free (empty, or loosely holding a mug/book) and holds NO second device
grammar.physics: the ring stays clipped on the finger; thumb presses DOWN on the top buttons; on-screen feed scrolls VERTICALLY (up only, never a horizontal carousel — the product only scrolls vertically); the screen is never physically touched

screens_and_text: the phone screen shows a GENERIC vertical short-video feed of abstract colorful content cards; NO brand names, NO readable text, NO recognizable iOS/Android app UI; any tiny UI text is blurred and illegible
